trans-unit.source: No import configs match your search.
Required. Imported issues are not capped per run.
Required. Matching pages are fetched in full (paginated against Confluence).
Delete connection ""? Related import configs may stop working.
Clear all sync markers for this config? External items may be re-imported as duplicates.
No data yet. Apply filters and load statistics.
Filter drops and flags by type
The tool has not returned a result yet.
No messages yet. Start a conversation!
This message was filtered and dropped by the system.
Connect to socket to send messages
Create the default OpenClaw configuration file in the container. This writes .openclaw/openclaw.json so the gateway can load its settings.
Edit the configuration in the editor to customize the gateway settings, adding and configuring channels, AI models, and more.
Restart the agent so it picks up the new configuration.
You are all set. Say hello to your new bot in the chat, try a question, or start a task. Have fun!
Select additional environments to enrich context more specifically. The active environment is included automatically.
Are you sure you want to delete the workspace ?
This workspace has a provisioned server. Deleting the workspace will also delete the server from the cloud provider. This action cannot be undone and will result in permanent data loss.
Are you sure you want to delete the environment ?
Sets AUTO_ENRICH_ENABLED_GLOBAL on the new workspace agent-manager.
0–2 (pgvector <=>). Only knowledge chunks at or below this distance are used; default 1.
-----BEGIN OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY----- ... -----END OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY-----
These features partially ignore the internal permissions and may allow users to modify the agent container files without any restrictions.
Enable VNC access to the environment's virtual workspace. Defaults to disabled.
Enable SSH access to the environment container. Defaults to disabled.
Leave empty to keep current or auto-generate
Changing the environment variables will re-create the agent's container. Context may be lost.
Control whether this agent may run autonomous ticket prototyping, including scope and safety limits.
No users assigned to this workspace
Open agent config in New Window
Open provider agent config files (requires workspace management access)
Open Deployment Manager in New Window
No deployment configuration found. Create one to get started.
Are you sure you want to delete this deployment configuration?
Leave empty to keep the current token
Leave empty to keep current token
Please select a workspace and agent
Select a run from the list to view details
Are you sure you want to cancel this run? In-progress jobs may be stopped.
Please select a workspace and agent
Select a file from the tree to start editing
The file has been updated by another user while you have unsaved changes.
What would you like to do?
Accept: Reload the file from the server (your unsaved changes will be lost)
Reject: Keep your local changes and override the external changes when you save
You previously rejected external changes to . Saving now will override those newer changes.
Are you sure you want to proceed?
Use '.' for root directory, or enter a relative path like 'folder' or 'folder/subfolder'
In sync with remote - Click to open Version Control
Local changes (staged, unstaged, or unpushed) - Click to open Version Control
Merge conflicts detected - Click to open Version Control
Are you sure you want to delete the directory ?:path:
Are you sure you want to delete the file ?:path:
Enter a new name for the directory
Enter a new name for the file
The directory will be moved to:
The file will be moved to:
Enter the name (e.g. feature/new-ui) or a remote ref (e.g. origin/feature/new-ui).
Enter branch name or remote ref
Checkout and create local tracking branch
Use conventional commit prefix (feat/, fix/, chore/, etc.)
Switching files will discard any unsaved changes!
Click "New" to create a terminal session
Select a page from the tree to start editing.
Type to search all pages and folders in this workspace.
Search by title or SHA and add one or more relation targets.
You don't have any workspaces yet.
Are you sure you want to delete this item?
Match: the message would be dropped.
Delete this rule? Remote copies will be removed where possible.
You don't have any workspaces yet.
Create one from Spaces, or open Spaces if a workspace was shared with you.
Generate description with AI (uses selected agent)
Describe the ticket. Changes save when you leave this field.
Configuration changes may require approval before runs execute.
If none are selected, every agent with prototype autonomy enabled for this workspace may run this ticket. Select specific agents to restrict who can pick it up.
No agents have prototype autonomy enabled for this workspace. Enable it for an agent in chat under Prototype autonomy. Only those agents can run autonomous ticket work.
Allowed agents not listed above—uncheck to remove (e.g. autonomy off or agent removed)
Select additional environments to enrich context more specifically. The active run environment is included automatically.
No environments available for context enrichment.
Optional — leave empty to use repository default
Force a fresh branch on the next run
Use when a run is stuck; the flag clears after the next run starts.
Search by title or SHA and add one or more relation targets.
The ticket and its subtasks in this workspace will move to the workspace you select. You must be a workspace admin in both places.
No steps recorded for this run.
Open a run from the ticket detail panel.
Are you sure you want to delete this ticket?
Search by title, description, or id
Type to search all tickets in this workspace, including done and closed.
Could not apply generated text (missing session).
Matches Agent for chat / AI — change the chat agent to allow unchecking.
Select a space before creating a ticket.
Select an environment and agent for chat.
Select an agent and ensure a ticket is open.
Enter the 6-character confirmation code you received via email (letters and numbers). You can paste the code or type it in the fields below.
Email confirmation is not available for this authentication method.
Please enter a valid email address.
Code must be exactly 6 characters (uppercase letters and numbers).

Centralized control for distributed AI agent infrastructure. Manage multiple agent-manager instances, interact with agents in real-time, and edit code directly in their containers - all from one powerful dashboard.
Connect to and manage multiple remote agent-manager services from a single console
WebSocket-based bidirectional communication with AI agents and instant responses
Edit files directly in agent containers with Monaco Editor - read, write, and manage code in real-time
Docker-based agent execution with live log streaming and file system operations
Please enter a valid email address.
Join Agenstra to manage your AI agent infrastructure. After registration, you will receive an email to confirm your account before you can log in.
User registration is not available for this authentication method.
Please enter a valid email address.
Password must be at least 8 characters.
Already have an account? Log in
If an account exists for the email you entered, you will receive a password reset code. Enter the code below and choose a new password.
Password reset is not available for this authentication method.
Request a password reset to receive a code via email.
Please enter a valid email address.
Code must be exactly 6 characters (uppercase letters and numbers).
Password must be at least 8 characters.
Enter your email address and we will send you a link to reset your password. If an account exists for that email, you will receive instructions shortly.
Password reset is not available for this authentication method.
Please enter a valid email address.
Enter the reset code you received via email and choose a new password. The code is typically sent when you request a password reset.
Password reset is not available for this authentication method.
Please enter a valid email address.
Code must be exactly 6 characters (uppercase letters and numbers).
Password must be at least 8 characters.
Leave empty to keep the current password
Are you sure you want to delete the user ?
